channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: deepreinforce-ai/Ornith-1
item.description: (no description)

item.title: davidondrej/skills
item.description: access to david ondrej's personal agent skills

item.title: Younesfdj/gitfut
item.description: Your GitHub stats, turned into a World-Cup-style player card

item.title: ammaarreshi/Generals-Mac-iOS-iPad
item.description: Command & Conquer Generals: Zero Hour running natively on macOS, iPhone & iPad — real engine (EA GPL v3 source, via GeneralsX), DXVK/MoltenVK renderer, RTS touch controls. No game assets included.

item.title: elder-plinius/T3MP3ST
item.description: autonomous red teaming platform; multi-agent offensive-security meta-harness

item.title: facebook/astryx
item.description: An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready

item.title: Augani/dory
item.description: A free, open-source native macOS app for Docker & Linux containers, an alternative to OrbStack and Docker Desktop. Universal for Intel and Apple silicon.

item.title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
item.description: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.

item.title: yynxxxxx/Codex-X
item.description: Codex Switch & Instruct desktop manager

item.title: teamchong/pxpipe
item.description: cut Fable 5 token usage by rendering text context as images

item.title: uzairansaruzi/hermex
item.description: Native iPhone app for your Hermes agent

item.title: PlummersSoftwareLLC/TinyRetroPad
item.description: (no description)

item.title: jamesob/local-llm
item.description: Everything I know about running LLMs locally

item.title: HUANGCHIHHUNGLeo/claude-real-video
item.description: Let Claude (or any LLM) actually watch a video — scene-aware, deduplicated frames + transcript, from a URL or local file. Runs locally, MIT.

item.title: Gitlawb/zero
item.description: The coding agent that answers to you, your model, your machine, your rules.

item.title: lycorp-jp/sim-use
item.description: Give your AI agent eyes and hands on iOS Simulator and Android emulator/devices.

item.title: Kulaxyz/self-learning-skills
item.description: A self-improving skill for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, AGENTS.md): recognize a hard-won golden path in a session and harvest it into a reusable skill/rule for next time.

item.title: xt4d/GameBlocks
item.description: Concise and self-explanatory building blocks that help coding agents prototype browser-based 3D games.

item.title: spiritov/ds.css
item.description: A css framework recreating the DS / DS Lite's UI

item.title: joaogfc/ZeroDelay
item.description: Reduz a latência de lives do YouTube — extensão Manifest V3 que acelera a reprodução para alcançar o ao vivo.

item.title: erincatto/box3d
item.description: Box3D is a 3D physics engine for games

item.title: langchain-ai/openwiki
item.description: OpenWiki is a CLI that writes and maintains agent documentation for your codebase.

item.title: vidhitam/Data_Recovery
item.description: Recover accidentally deleted files from HDD, SSD, USB, and memory cards. Quick and deep scan modes.

item.title: itsbalihere/Barry_s_Prison_Run_-_Auto-Escape___ESP
item.description: Auto-escape and ESP for Barry's Prison Run, the prison escape game[reference:42]. Escape prison, avoid guards, and survive every round.

item.title: JokiTsien/App_Store_Play_Store_Review_Bot
item.description: Auto-post reviews and ratings for apps on Google Play and Apple App Store. Boost app rankings and credibility.

item.title: johndev-robo/Color_Picker_with_Palette_Builder
item.description: Pick colors from anywhere on screen, get Hex, RGB, HSL, and CMYK values. Build, save, and export color palettes for design projects.

item.title: pawanlaksahan/Elden_Ring_Rune_Farm___God_Mode
item.description: AFK rune farm, one-hit kill, item duplicator, and god mode for Elden Ring. Automatically kill enemies for runes, one-shot bosses, and duplicate items.

item.title: buildsbyShlok/Berry_Avenue_RP_-_Auto-Farm___Money_Hack
item.description: Auto-farm and money hack for Berry Avenue RP, the popular roleplay game. Farm money, unlock all houses and vehicles, and dominate the social experience.

item.title: google-research/tabfm
item.description: (no description)

item.title: mekos2772/ios-location-spoofer
item.description: Standalone iOS app to spoof GPS location without jailbreak. Includes Shadowrocket/Surge/Loon/QX/Stash module.

item.title: headroomlabs-ai/headroom
item.description: Compress tool outputs, logs, files, and RAG chunks before they reach the LLM. 60-95% fewer tokens, same answers. Library, proxy, MCP server.

item.title: zhaixiansen1023-cpu/QR_Code_Scanner
item.description: Scan QR codes and barcodes from images, webcam, or screenshots. Decode instantly and copy to clipboard.

item.title: theartistscut1-uig/Metro_Last_Light_Unlimited_Ammo___Filters
item.description: Unlimited ammo, filters, and health for Metro Last Light. Never run out of oxygen, infinite military-grade rounds, and god mode.

item.title: hnfroy/GTA_V_Online_Money_Maker
item.description: Automated heists, car duping, and RP farming for GTA Online (safest method). Complete heists effortlessly, duplicate high-end vehicles, and earn millions in minutes. Works in public and private lobbies.

item.title: serder8866/Universal_USB_Boot_Maker
item.description: Create bootable USB drives for Windows, Linux, etc. Write ISO to USB, multiple OS on one USB, format USB drive, and verify files. Install OS easily.

item.title: zhujingqi/Twitter_Engagement_Tool
item.description: Auto-tweet, follow/unfollow, and like/retweet scheduler. Schedule tweets, gain followers, like tweets, and reply to mentions. Grow your Twitter audience.

item.title: triangkas/Skyrim_Special_Edition_God_Mode
item.description: Unlimited health, stamina, magicka, and all perks unlocked. Invincibility, max stats, all perks, and infinite carry weight. Ultimate mod for Skyrim SE.

item.title: meuttamsharma/RAM_Cleaner___Optimizer
item.description: Free up RAM, optimize memory usage, and boost system performance. Clear cache, defragment memory, and monitor usage.

item.title: anonimosptzs-sys/God_of_War__2018__Unlimited_Rage___Health
item.description: Unlimited health, rage, and all runic attacks for God of War (2018). God mode, infinite Spartan Rage, and unlock all upgrades.

item.title: nihalupreti/Cyberpunk_2077_Night_City_Enhancer
item.description: Unlimited eddies, all cyberware, and vehicle spawner for CP2077. Max money, all cyberware, spawn any vehicle, and god mode. Best mod for Night City.

item.title: devcraftt/Reddit_Karma_Farmer
item.description: Auto-post, comment, and upvote to earn karma on Reddit. Post content, comment on posts, upvote posts, and earn karma automatically. Build your Reddit reputation.

item.title: NagaaSaketh/Minecraft_AutoMiner_Pro
item.description: Full-featured mining bot with X-Ray, auto-farm, anti-kick and ore ESP for Minecraft 1.20+. Automates resource gathering, reveals ores through walls, and prevents AFK kicks. Perfect for survival and hardcore modes.

item.title: yheun03/Doom_Eternal_Unlimited_Ammo___Health
item.description: Unlimited ammo, health, and armor for Doom Eternal. God mode, infinite BFG, and all weapon mods. Rip and tear effortlessly.

item.title: jawadashraf772/Windows_System_Optimizer
item.description: Clean junk files, optimize registry, and boost performance. Remove temp files, fix registry, manage startup, and free up memory. Speed up your PC.

item.title: mat-mgm/kb-prolog
item.description: A hyper-relational knowledge base with content-addressable storage, built on Prolog, SQLite, and C.

item.title: unicity-sphere/sphere-sdk-connect-example
item.description: (no description)

item.title: unicity-sphere/sphere
item.description: A Web3 wallet and agent platform for the Unicity network - dual-layer crypto wallet, DMs, group chat, and marketplace.

item.title: baairon/torlink
item.description: A sleek, zero-setup torrent finder and downloader that lives right in your terminal.

item.title: facebookresearch/brain2qwerty
item.description: Non-invasive decoding of typed sentences from MEG and EEG brain recordings using a convolutional encoder, transformer, and character-level language model.

item.title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
item.description: A comprehensive dataset of 433 fitness exercises. Each entry includes name, category, target muscle group, equipment, instructions, thumbnail image, and animation video.

item.title: librepods-org/librepods
item.description: AirPods liberated from Apple's ecosystem.

item.title: gamedev-skills/awesome-gamedev-agent-skills
item.description: Game-development Agent Skills for AI coding agents: install once and a master router loads the right skill for your engine and task. 66 original, version-pinned skills (plus a master router) in the portable SKILL.md format that runs across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Copilot, Gemini CLI and more, for Godot, Unity, Unreal, web and beyond.

item.title: tdeverx/contained-app
item.description: A native macOS app for Apple's Container CLI

item.title: yynxxxxx/Codex-5.5-codex-instruct-5.5
item.description: (no description)
